name: BASICNET S.P.A. Azioni nom. EO
summary: BASICNET S.P.A. is an Italian company that operates in the apparel, footwear, and accessories industry. The company owns brands such as Kappa, Robe di Kappa, Jesus Jeans, K-Way, Superga, Briko and Sebago. BasicNet licenses its brands to a network of manufacturers and distributors worldwide.
